about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm a mobile software developer from Germany with a strong focus on React Native, TypeScript and Swift. I completed my B.Sc. in Computer Science (Software Engineering) at Aalen University and currently work at BARMER, contributing to one of Germany's largest healthcare applications.
about.paragraph2: My work includes developing and maintaining cross-platform mobile features, integrating native iOS components with Swift, creating automated tests with Jest and Pytest, and analyzing application crashes and incidents using Sentry. I'm also involved in dependency management, software updates and security-related topics within modern mobile applications.
about.paragraph3: Before joining BARMER, I worked as a full-stack developer at Heitec AG, where I contributed to internal web applications and backend systems. My bachelor thesis focused on building an OpenAPI-based Angular code generator to optimize development workflows.
about.paragraph4: I enjoy working on scalable architectures, developer tooling and clean user experiences. Beyond mobile development, I'm interested in software architecture, AI-assisted development workflows, security engineering and modern frontend ecosystems.
about.paragraph5: Outside of programming, I enjoy sports, traveling and learning languages. I currently speak German, English and Spanish and continuously work on improving my language skills and technical expertise.

digiBrain.title: DigiBrain
digiBrain.description: A React website for group brainstorming. It included a login system, CRUD operations, live updates and the GPT API. I was part of the backend team with Express.js.

quote.title: Quote
quote.description: A Next.js website for a friend to move on from a Word document. It includes CRUD operations, a login system, responsive design, dark mode and live updates. Deployed on Vercel.

eLearning.title: E-Learning Project
eLearning.description: A React Native mobile app for e-learning. It included a single learning mode for English vocabularies and a virtual classroom where multiple people could learn together in realtime.

graveyardShooter.title: Graveyard Shooter
graveyardShooter.description: A university group project where we created a dynamic singleplayer VR shooter game with animations, movement, shooting mechanics and a scoring system.

arRaceCar.title: AR-Race Car
arRaceCar.description: A Unity AR mobile app with two modes. One mode used the car camera stream over TCP, while the other included AR functionality. I worked on the mobile application while the embedded system was developed with Python.

aelianasJourney.title: Aelianas Journey
aelianasJourney.description: A university group project where we developed a 2D jump-and-run game in Unity. A leaderboard system was included to add a competitive aspect.

codeGenerator.title: OpenAPI-based Code Generator
codeGenerator.description: Bachelor thesis: A code generation tool based on OpenAPI to optimize development workflows. Focused on generating reusable frontend code from API definitions.
